course.title: Natural Language Processing Specialization
course.description: Four-course specialization by Younes Bensouda Mourri and Łukasz Kaiser covering classification, sequence models, attention, and transformers. Includes hands-on labs in TensorFlow.

course.title: Practical Deep Learning for Coders
course.description: Jeremy Howard's project-first deep learning course. Start with a working classifier in lesson 1 using fastai on top of PyTorch, then work downward into the internals. Covers vision, tabular, collaborative filtering, NLP.

course.title: Complete AI & Machine Learning Bootcamp 2022
course.description: Learn AI and ML from zero in 10 hours! Covers every topic in AI: NumPy basics, linear regression, a bit of TensorFlow 1.x, and a chatbot project. No prerequisites assumed.

course.title: CS231n: Deep Learning for Computer Vision
course.description: Graduate-level course by Fei-Fei Li et al. on CNN architectures, training, and visual recognition. Includes programming assignments, a final project, and the classic backprop-by-hand section. Lecture videos + notes free; certification through SCPD.

course.title: ChatGPT Prompt Engineering Masterclass 2023
course.description: Unlock ChatGPT's full power! 50 prompts that will 10x your productivity. No prior experience needed. Bonus: includes templates for resume writing and social media.
